risk_note.tr: Disk klonlama yedek almadan yapilirsa kaynak veri risk altinda olabilir. Onemli dosyalari once harici diske yedekleyin.
risk_note.en: Cloning without backup risks source data. Back up important files to external drive first.

prerequisites.tr: Yeni SSD (mevcut diskin kullanilan alanindan buyuk)
prerequisites.en: New SSD (larger than used space on current drive)

body.tr: Belgeler, Resimler, masaustu vb. harici diske kopyalayin. File History veya basit Copy-Paste yeterli.
body.en: Copy Documents, Pictures, Desktop, etc. to external drive. File History or simple copy-paste works.

body.tr: USB-SATA kablo veya enclosure ile SSD'yi USB'den bagla. Disk Management'ta gorunecek; format gerekmeyecek (klonlama bunu yapar).
body.en: Connect SSD via USB-SATA cable / enclosure. It'll appear in Disk Management; no formatting needed (clone tool does it).

body.tr: Macrium Reflect Free, Samsung Data Migration (Samsung SSD), Acronis True Image (Crucial/WD), Clonezilla. Hedef: SSD; Kaynak: mevcut C: drive.
body.en: Macrium Reflect Free, Samsung Data Migration (Samsung), Acronis True Image (Crucial/WD), Clonezilla. Target: SSD; Source: current C: drive.

body.tr: Klonlama biterse bilgisayari kapat, fisi cek, eski HDD'yi cikar, SSD'yi takabilecegin yuvasina yerlestir. BIOS'tan boot order'i SSD'ye al.
body.en: After clone completes, power off, unplug, remove old HDD, insert SSD into its slot. Change BIOS boot order to SSD.

body.tr: Windows acildiktan sonra D-Medic > Sistem Detaylari ile disk tipi SSD goruldugunu teyit edin. 'fsutil behavior query DisableDeleteNotify' = 0 olmali (TRIM aktif).
body.en: After Windows boots, confirm disk type SSD via D-Medic > System Details. 'fsutil behavior query DisableDeleteNotify' should return 0 (TRIM enabled).
